hero.introAfter: , located at 134 Pinelands Rd, Sunnybank Hills, QLD, Australia ("Company", "we", "us", or "our"), collects, uses, processes, and protects personal information when you use the PhotoMone platform ("Service").
hero.agree: By accessing or using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

overview.heading: 1. Overview of Data Use
bullets: The Service does not trade or distribute real user identity or portrait rights
Uploaded images are used as input data to generate entirely new, synthetic images
Generated Content does not represent real individuals

informationCollect.heading: 2. Information We Collect
userContentItems: Any data submitted within the Service

howWeUse.heading: 3. How We Use Information
bullets: Generate AI-based images from Input Content
Improve system performance and user experience

aiProcessing.heading: 4. AI Processing and Generated Content
aiProcessing.explicitAgree: By using the Service, you explicitly agree that:
aiProcessing.bulletProcessAi: Your uploaded images may be processed by AI systems
aiProcessing.bulletTransformSynthetic: Your data may be transformed into new, synthetic Generated Content
generatedContentPoints: Cannot be used to determine your identity

anonymization.heading: 5. Data Anonymization and Transformation
anonymization.appliesIncluding: The Service applies transformation processes including:
ensureItems: Generated Content is not a direct copy
Generated Content is not linked to a specific individual

sharing.heading: 6. Data Sharing and Disclosure
bullets: With service providers (hosting, analytics, AI processing)
With partners involved in AI development
When required by law or legal processes
sharing.noSell: We do not sell personal data as identifiable user information.

storage.heading: 7. Data Storage and Security
storage.safeguards: We implement reasonable safeguards to protect data, including:
howeverItems: Users acknowledge inherent risks of online services

retention.heading: 8. Data Retention
retainBullets: As long as necessary to provide the Service
For legal, regulatory, and operational purposes
retention.inactiveNote: even after account inactivity, where necessary.

userRights.heading: 9. User Rights (Australia)
userRights.underLaws: Under applicable laws, Users may have the right to:
ackItems: AI-generated content cannot be reversed into original identity data
Certain data may be retained for legal or system integrity purposes

cookies.heading: 10. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.browserNote: Users may control cookies through browser settings.

thirdParty.heading: 11. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.processNote: These third parties may process data on our behalf.

children.heading: 12. Children's Privacy
children.notUnder18: The Service is not intended for users under 18.
children.noMinors: We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

changes.heading: 13. Changes to This Policy
changes.mayUpdate: We may update this Privacy Policy at any time.
changes.reviewResponsibility: Users are responsible for reviewing updates.

contact.heading: 14. Contact Information
contact.address: 134 Pinelands Rd, Sunnybank Hills, QLD, Australia

finalAck.heading: 15. Final Acknowledgment
finalAck.byUsing: By using the Service, you acknowledge and agree that:
bullets: Your uploaded images may be used for AI processing
Generated Content is synthetic and not personal data
The Company may use data for AI training and development
Absolute data deletion may not always be possible due to system design
